recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Manhunt
recommendations.overview: Accused of a murder he didn't commit, a prosecutor sets out on a mission to clear his name.

recommendations.title: Spenser Confidential
recommendations.overview: Spenser, a former Boston patrolman who just got out from prison, teams up with Hawk, an aspiring fighter, to unravel the truth behind the death of two police officers.

recommendations.title: The Art of War
recommendations.overview: Neil Shaw is both agent and weapon - a critical line of defense for the Secretary General of the United Nations. He does not even officially exist. As an international security expert, he must uncover an international plot in which ruthless terrorist

recommendations.title: The Seven-Ups
recommendations.overview: A tough detective who is part of an elite New York City unit is trying to find out who killed his partner, but uncovers a plot to kidnap mobsters for money.

recommendations.title: The Art of War II: Betrayal
recommendations.overview: Agent Neil Shaw is called out of retirement and finds himself in the midst of a plot to assassinate several leading Senators with himself set-up to take the rap for a recent killing

recommendations.title: The Big Heat
recommendations.overview: After the suspicious suicide of a fellow cop, tough homicide detective Dave Bannion takes the law into his own hands when he sets out to smash a vicious crime syndicate.

recommendations.title: The Enforcer
recommendations.overview: Dirty Harry Callahan returns again, this time saddled with a rookie female partner. Together, they must stop a terrorist group consisting of angry Vietnam veterans.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: An unconventional undercover Chicago cop and his partner are recruited to commit the murder of a New Orleans criminal kingpin.

recommendations.title: The Dead Pool
